title: Buyer priorities and solution mapping by insurer

source.file: input_data/corpus/20200803 PC-Strategy-Solution Development and GoToMarket PlanVer1.5.xlsx

grain: one row per (insurer, buyer-priority / solution-mapping) entry
summary: A denormalized mapping of a few insurer groups (e.g. Travelers, Allstate, CNA) to their stated buyer/strategic priorities (e.g. "Strong Top Line Performance", "Optimizing our productivity and efficiency") and to candidate solution offerings and components (FNOL, PaaS, endorsement processing, voice CoE features) with an initiation status. WARNING: the detected header row contains actual data values, so column headers are unreliable; treat contents structurally and confirm layout with the data owner.
use_cases: What buyer/strategic priorities are recorded for a given insurer?
Which solution offerings or components are mapped to an insurer's priorities?
What is the initiation status of a mapped solution for an insurer?
